cells.rationale: Keystone pure projector every surface derives from with byte-identity and single-source-of-truth constraints — a wrong abstraction propagates repo-wide.
ADR-0011 gated snapshot fold touches the shared readiness-client wire contract with a strict first-paint byte-identity invariant, so a subtle miswire silently corrupts every consumer.
Additive NDJSON delta-vocabulary evolution with coalesce/flap-settle and no-op-churn semantics is contract-shaped wire work where a shape mistake breaks old consumers.
Seven await conditions with signature-anchored re-arm grammar, derived fold opt-in, and a structural no-silent-wait invariant span multiple surfaces with contract-grade correctness risk.
New-pattern checked-in watchdog with debounced anomaly/liveness logic plus an invariant-preserving skill rewrite is agentic new-pattern work, not mechanical prose.
Bounded, well-specified forward-facing doc alignment plus a regenerated baked index via the existing bake flow — literal template-following that sonnet handles precisely.
